use_cases: Displaying user profiles with verification status in comment sections
Showing verified user avatars in social platforms
Displaying team member avatars with status indicators
User identification in messaging and chat interfaces
Profile display with authentication status in dashboards
ai_summary: A user avatar component featuring a teal ring border and a positioned verification checkmark badge. Supports both light and dark modes with proper accessibility attributes. Designed for displaying verified user profiles in various contexts like comments, team pages, or social platforms.
